name: British Spotted Dick
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, sugar, salt, and baking powder.
2. Add the chopped suet and enough cold milk to form a soft dough that is not sticky.
3. Shape into a roll and place on a scalded, well-floured pudding cloth.
4. Roll up loosely and tie the ends of the cloth.
5. Place in a saucepan with fast-boiling water, reduce heat, and simmer for 2 to 2.5 hours.
6. Drain well and unwrap.
7. Slice and serve with any custard or sweet sauce, or warmed golden syrup and cream.
Note: This recipe requires extended simmering time under low heat.
